hero.description: Weekboard is a goal execution management service that goes beyond setting goals. It helps turn weekly goals into day-by-day action plans so users can actually follow through.
hero.companyDescription: Openstrap develops and supplies application software. Weekboard is one of Openstrap’s main services, helping users turn their goals into plans they can execute every day.

trustedBy.title: Used by people preparing for opportunities at leading technology companies.
trustedBy.disclaimer: Company names do not imply official partnerships, endorsements, or customer relationships.

features.title: Designed to go beyond simply setting goals.
features.description: Break weekly goals into daily action plans, then stay on track with time reminders, goal lock, and progress tracking.

weeklyGoalPlanning.title: Weekly Goal-Based Planning
weeklyGoalPlanning.desc: Start by organizing the goals you want to achieve this week and setting a clear direction. Instead of beginning with scattered daily tasks, you can plan around bigger weekly goals.

dailyGoalBreakdown.title: Daily Action Plan Distribution
dailyGoalBreakdown.desc: Divide weekly goals into day-by-day action items so you know exactly what to do each day. Large goals become practical daily plans you can actually execute.

copyGoals.title: Copy Goals by Day
copyGoals.desc: Quickly copy weekly goals to the days you choose and reduce repetitive input. You can distribute goals to every day, selected days, or even carry them into next week.

timeReminders.title: Execution Time & Reminders
timeReminders.desc: Set a specific time and reminder for each daily goal. Your goals become scheduled action plans inside your day, not just items on a list.

goalLock.title: Goal Delete Lock
goalLock.desc: Lock important goals so they cannot be deleted too easily. It helps protect the commitments you made to yourself from momentary laziness or the urge to give up.

progressTracking.title: Progress Tracking
progressTracking.desc: Check your weekly execution status based on completed goals. Go beyond simple checkmarks and see at a glance how much your goals are actually being carried out.

somedayGoals.title: Someday Goals & Plans
somedayGoals.desc: Save ideas and long-term goals that you are not ready to execute right now. Keep this week’s plans separate from future goals so good ideas do not get lost.

crossDeviceSync.title: Automatic Sync
crossDeviceSync.desc: Manage the same goal status across mobile and web. Check and update your goals on your phone while moving, or on the web while working, without losing continuity.

aiGoalPlanning.title: AI Goal Planning Support
aiGoalPlanning.desc: Enter a vague goal and get help turning it into practical steps and realistic daily plans. Even users who are not used to planning goals can get started right away.

cta.title: If you’ve set a goal, now it’s time to execute.
cta.description: Use Weekboard to turn this week’s goals into daily plans you can actually follow.
